CustomField.formula:
IF( Active_User__c =FALSE, "Not a FIMBY User", IF( LEFT(Household_Account__c ,15) = LEFT($User.HouseholdID__c,15) || LEFT($User.ProfileId,15) = "00e5f000002g3Zx",
IF(Give_Take_Count__c <= -6, IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/RedCircle.png","Red Light", 18,18) + " " + IF(Give_Take_Count__c >= 0, " ","") + TEXT(Give_Take_Count__c), IF(Give_Take_Count__c < 0, IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/YellowCircle.png","Yellow Light", 18,18)+ " " + IF(Give_Take_Count__c >= 0, " ","") +TEXT(Give_Take_Count__c), IF(Give_Take_Count__c >= 0, IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/GreenCircle.png","Green Light", 18,18)+ " " + IF(Give_Take_Count__c >= 0, " ","") +TEXT(Give_Take_Count__c), ""))), "<Private>"))
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The 'Give & Receive Balance' totals up all Posting & Reponses you have made for yourself and others to help you know if you are giving and receiveing in equal measure. Note: You can only see your own household's totals, no one else's.
Calucation Process: Need Postings for your 'Self' and accepted Responses to Offers for your 'Self' decrease your total (Receiving) while all other Post and Response types (Giving) increase your total.
CustomField.label: Give & Receive Balance
